## Merchant editability

<!-- New/changed sections must be configurable from the theme editor. Confirm: -->
- [ ] New content is driven by section **settings / blocks / presets** (no hardcoded copy that a merchant would need a developer to change)
- [ ] Any new section is wired into the right **template JSON or section group**

## Checks

- [ ] `shopify theme check` passes locally (0 errors)
- [ ] Verified in `shopify theme dev` on desktop **and** mobile widths
- [ ] Edge cases considered (empty cart, product with no image / one variant, sold out, empty collection)
- [ ] No new hardcoded strings that should be theme settings or locale keys
